### Fix 2
Lines: 596, 623, 647, 656
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: div

Component: Button
Prop: icon

I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1: Button.variant type changed** — The `variant` type added `'stateful'` but all existing values (`"link"`, `ButtonVariant.primary`, `ButtonVariant.secondary`) are still valid. No code changes needed — these values still exist in the new type.

**Fix 2: Button icon children-to-prop** — I need to check each Button instance:
- Line 596-606: Contains `{t('Edit')}` text AND `<KialiIcon.PencilAlt className={editIcon} />` icon → move icon to `icon` prop
- Line 623-633: Same pattern — `{t('Edit')}` text AND `<KialiIcon.PencilAlt className={editIcon} />` → move icon to `icon` prop  
- Line 647-653: Contains only `{t('Preview')}` text, no icon → no change needed
- Line 656-657: Contains only `{t('Cancel')}` text, no icon → no change needed

**Fix 3: HelperTextItem icon children-to-prop** — I need to check each instance:
- Line 509-511: Contains only text `{t('An Istio Config resource...')}`, no icon → no change needed
- Line 524-525: Contains only text, no icon → no change needed  
- Line 548: Contains only text, no icon → no change needed

So the only actual changes needed are for Fix 2 on the two "Edit" buttons (lines 596-606 and 623-633), moving the `KialiIcon.PencilAlt` to the `icon` prop.

content.text: The changes look correct. Let me also verify the HelperTextItem sections are untouched (they had no icons, so no changes needed):

Good — all HelperTextItem instances contain only text (no icons), so they are correct as-is.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
**No change needed.** The type change added `'stateful'` to the union. All existing values used in this file (`"link"`, `ButtonVariant.primary`, `ButtonVariant.secondary`) remain valid in the new type. No code modification required.

### Fix 2: `Button` icon children-to-prop
**Applied** to 2 of 4 locations:
- **Line 596 (Labels "Edit" button):** Moved `<KialiIcon.PencilAlt className={editIcon} />` from children to the `icon` prop. Text child `{t('Edit')}` remains as children.
- **Line 623 (Annotations "Edit" button):** Same change — moved `<KialiIcon.PencilAlt className={editIcon} />` from children to the `icon` prop.
- **Line 647 ("Preview" button):** No change needed — contains only text `{t('Preview')}`, no icon.
- **Line 656 ("Cancel" button):** No change needed — contains only text `{t('Cancel')}`, no icon.

### Fix 3: `HelperTextItem` icon children-to-prop
**No change needed** for all 3 locations. All `<HelperTextItem>` instances (lines 509, 524, 548) contain only text children with no icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No migration is required.
